title: Verify playwright exec fires in verify stage
description: This task verifies that the kody pipeline correctly executes `npx playwright test` in the verify stage after running the build stage. The CSS tweak (h1 font-weight change from bold to 500) has already been committed in ce32e2d. The expected outcome is that verify.md shows `Running tool playwright: npx playwright test` and the pipeline respects playwright test results.
existing_patterns: .kody/tools.yml - playwright tool configuration with verify stage
